Task.title: Task
Task.description: A task that represents a prioritized objective with a deadline, effort estimation, and optional notes

deadline.description: The date and time deadline in ISO format

completed.description: Whether the task has been marked complete

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns this task

User.title: User
User.description: User profile containing email and authentication details

updatedAt.description: The ISO timestamp of when the profile was last synchronized

tasks/{taskId}.description: A flat collection of tasks belonging to different authenticated users

users/{userId}.description: User profiles stored upon successful login/active session
